phrases.translation: Physical persons and living communities with real interests at stake
phrases.legalRef: UN Charter — Right to Dignity & Participation

phrases.translation: Shift in energy production — physical communities in fossil fuel regions face livelihood displacement without guaranteed replacement
phrases.legalRef: UN Charter — Right to Work & Dignity / Planetary Boundaries

phrases.translation: Civilian casualties — physical bodies of non-combatants killed or wounded
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Protection of the Civilian Population

phrases.translation: Insufficient access to food for physical survival — a condition caused by policy, conflict, or resource extraction, not natural scarcity
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention IV, Art. 55 / UDHR Art. 25 — Right to Food

phrases.translation: Targeted physical destruction or killing framed as accurate to reduce perceived moral weight
Deployment of machines to replace physical workers — displacing persons from livelihoods with no guaranteed transition support
phrases.legalRef: UN Charter — Right to Work & Dignity / UDHR Art. 23

phrases.translation: Sustained aerial destruction of physical infrastructure and persons
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Prohibition of Indiscriminate Attack

phrases.translation: Restriction of trade and financial access — physical impact includes civilian shortages of food, medicine, and fuel
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention IV, Art. 55 / UDHR Art. 25

phrases.translation: Physical harms borne by bodies and habitats that accounting systems treat as invisible
Emissions target allowing continued release balanced by offsets — does not prevent ongoing thermal stress to habitat and physical communities
phrases.legalRef: Planetary Boundaries Framework — Thermal Threshold / Ecocide Framework
